title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Behavior Case: Oop Mro C3
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop mro c3 increment in an extensible resource type hierarchy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict C3 method resolution order and diagnose inconsistent or surprising multiple-inheritance graphs.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
